name: Peregrine Gold Limited
summary: Peregrine Gold Limited engages in the gold exploration business. The company holds the Pilbara Gold Project, which comprises seven tenements covering approximately 636 KM√Ç¬≤ in the gold prospective Pilbara region of Western Australia. Peregrine Gold Limited was formerly known as PILBARA AURUM LTD. The company was incorporated in 2020 and is based in Perth, Australia. Peregrine Gold Limited is a subsidiary of Odyssey Gold Limited.
